candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Not current assets; included only because it appeared in shortlist.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at period end
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash, but CHE should come from balance sheet when available.
Component of cash, not total cash and cash equivalents.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet total rather than components or cash flow ending cash.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Only a component of current liabilities, not the total.
Balancing line, not the reported total.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best clean current debt line on the balance sheet; matches short-term interest-bearing debt and excludes leases.
Represents current portion of long-term debt for some years, but using it together with current interest-bearing borrowings could double count; less consistently reported.
Likely interest-bearing current debt/payables in one year; could capture short-term debt when borrowings label is absent.

variables.notes: Chose current interest-bearing debt labels and excluded lease liabilities. Did not include 'Debt - Long-Term - Maturities - within 1 Year' to avoid potential double counting against the cleaner current debt lines.

candidates.why: Best match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities on the balance sheet.
Non-current/deferred taxes, not taxes payable.
Tax receivable asset, opposite of taxes payable.

variables.notes: No shortlist candidate existed; confidently selected the exact current tax liability label from the balance sheet.

candidates.why: Exact total net PPE line on the balance sheet; preferred for PPEGT.

candidates.row_label: Purchase of Property, Plant & Equipment Purchased/Sold - Net - Cash Flow
candidates.why: Cash flow investing line, not the balance sheet PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Proceeds from Sale of Property, Plant & Equipment Purchased/Sold - Net - Cash Flow
candidates.why: Disposal cash flow, not PPE balance.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet total net PPE line.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Selected the exact total assets line.

candidates.row_label: Net Cash Flow from Operating Activities
candidates.why: Exact net operating cash flow line from the cash flow statement.
Intermediate subtotal before interest/taxes; less preferred than final net operating cash flow.

final_choice.row_label: Net Cash Flow from Operating Activities

variables.notes: Preferred the final net operating cash flow line over the pre-interest/tax subtotal.
